source.title: PDD Holdings FY2025 Interest & Investment Income from Cash Float

extractions.claim: PDD earned RMB 25.6B in interest & investment income in FY2025, up 24% YoY, representing a hidden profit engine
extractions.evidence: FY2025 interest & investment income: RMB 25,583.8M (US$3,659.4M). FY2024: RMB 20,553.5M. Growth: +24.5% YoY. This is 27.0% of FY2025 operating profit (RMB 94,624.1M) and 25.7% of FY2025 net income (RMB 99,364.5M).

verification.verifier_notes: Direct from press release income statement. Ratios calculated from same source.

extractions.claim: PDD's cash + short-term investments reached RMB 422.3B ($60.4B) at year-end 2025, plus RMB 73.8B restricted cash and RMB 104.7B non-current assets (time deposits, debt securities)
extractions.evidence: Dec 31 2025: Cash & equivalents RMB 108,900.6M. Short-term investments RMB 313,407.7M. Restricted cash RMB 73,830.8M. Other non-current assets RMB 104,707.7M (mainly time deposits, held-to-maturity debt securities, available-for-sale debt securities). Total liquid assets ~RMB 600.8B.

verification.verifier_notes: Balance sheet from press release. Total liquid assets = 108.9B + 313.4B + 73.8B + 104.7B = 600.8B

extractions.claim: Implied yield on total liquid assets is approximately 4.3%, consistent with Chinese money market/treasury rates
extractions.evidence: FY2025 interest & investment income RMB 25,583.8M. Average liquid assets (FY2024 end: 331.6+68.4+83.4=483.4B; FY2025 end: 422.3+73.8+104.7=600.8B; average ~542.1B). Implied yield: 25.6/542.1 = ~4.7%. This is consistent with 1-year Chinese treasury deposit rates of 3.5-5.0%.

verification.verifier_notes: Average is approximate; actual quarterly average would differ. The yield calculation is directionally correct.

extractions.claim: Interest income alone explains why FY2025 net income (RMB 99.4B) exceeded operating profit (RMB 94.6B) despite FX losses
extractions.evidence: FY2025: Operating profit RMB 94,624.1M. Interest & investment income +RMB 25,583.8M. Other income +RMB 2,726.9M. FX loss -RMB 1,966.6M. Net income RMB 99,364.5M. Interest income more than offset the RMB 13.8B operating profit decline.

verification.verifier_notes: P&L walk from operating profit to net income using press release figures
